messages.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi there! I was hoping you could help me with an order I placed for my daughter. She hasn’t received it yet, and I’m a bit worried. Could you help me check where it was sent, if it’s still on the way, and maybe give me the tracking number? Also, I wanted to double-check the storage size of the tablet I ordered for her. And, if possible, I’d like to update my default shipping address to my daughter’s, so I don’t have to keep changing it every time.

Also, could you let me know the storage size of the tablet I ordered? I want to make sure it’s the right one for her.
